criteria.description: Reader can run `spec-kitty merge` on a default-policy project and find a non-empty, schema-valid retrospective.yaml afterward, with a RetrospectiveCaptured event in the mission's event log.
criteria.evidence: tests/integration/retrospective/test_default_flow_healthy.py — asserts record on disk + RetrospectiveCaptured event after default-flow completion. Backed by WP04 runtime wiring.
criteria.notes: Foundation work in WP01-WP03; runtime wiring in WP04 T018-T023.

criteria.description: Setting retrospective.enabled=false produces a merge with no retrospective artifacts, no retrospective events, and no warning.
criteria.evidence: tests/integration/retrospective/test_opt_out.py — asserts disabled-policy run emits no events, writes no record.

criteria.description: Setting retrospective.timing=before_completion + retrospective.failure_policy=block reproduces today's gate semantics with a clear blocking message citing the policy source.
criteria.evidence: tests/integration/retrospective/test_strict_flow_block.py — verifies strict-policy block raises RetrospectiveGateBlocked with structured policy_source citation. test_strict_flow_skip.py + test_strict_flow_skip_empty_reason_rejected.py cover the --skip-retrospective bypass path.

criteria.description: spec-kitty retrospect create --mission <handle> on an arbitrary completed mission in this repo produces a real, schema-valid record.
criteria.evidence: tests/cli/commands/test_retrospect.py::TestCreateCommand — exercises create against in-memory fixture missions with assertions on record schema, mission identity, provenance kind, and evidence references. 3 generator fixture missions in tests/retrospective/fixtures/missions/ (simple-clean, mid-with-rejections, large-with-gaps) demonstrate generator quality across mission shapes.
criteria.notes: Manual smoke against three real repo missions deferred to mission-review phase.

criteria.description: spec-kitty retrospect backfill --since 2026-01-01 on this repo's kitty-specs/ produces a JSON report enumerating created/skipped/failed counts that match a hand-tabulated expected count.
criteria.evidence: tests/cli/commands/test_retrospect.py::TestBackfillCommand — dry-run, real-run, since/until filtering, mission filter, emit-skipped/failures all covered with byte-for-byte JSON contract assertions.

criteria.description: Deprecation warning fires exactly once per process when an env var is set, names the durable replacement key, and the durable policy still wins.
criteria.evidence: tests/retrospective/test_env_deprecation.py — 4 classes covering one-warn-per-process (NFR-006), durable-wins-over-env, Rich stderr suppression, source_map env observation. 100% coverage on deprecation.py.

criteria.description: Reader of the updated docs can find — within 30 seconds of opening docs/how-to/use-retrospective-learning.md — the canonical post-merge sequence (mission review → author or verify retrospective → surface findings) and the difference between create, summary, and synthesize.
criteria.evidence: docs/how-to/use-retrospective-learning.md rewritten with all 10 required sections including 30-second mental model up top. PR #1136 wording corrected in docs/how-to/accept-and-merge.md and docs/how-to/merge-feature.md. 4 shipped skills updated. Verified by Reviewer Renata at WP07 review.
criteria.notes: Mission-review phase will repeat the doc walkthrough.

criteria.description: uv run pytest tests/ -q collects without error AND exits 0.
criteria.evidence: Full retrospective suite (tests/retrospective + tests/integration/retrospective + tests/next/test_retrospective_terminus_wiring.py + tests/cli/commands/test_retrospect.py) 549 tests passing as of WP07 review. NFR-001 aggregate runtime 24.78s (well under 60s budget).
criteria.notes: Cross-lane integration test on main branch deferred to post-merge validation.

negative_invariants.description: facilitator_callback=None must not be reachable from any enabled-policy path in runtime_bridge.py.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified by WP04 review at commit b1e87fb / WP04 approval event 01KS0K58SX1AQ7K0FB44ZZE4ZP. The dual-method wiring test (AST + runtime mock) in tests/next/test_retrospective_terminus_wiring.py catches any reintroduction. NOTE: this invariant only holds after lane-a merges into mission branch — pre-merge, src/specify_cli/next/runtime_bridge.py on the mission branch still has the old facilitator_callback=None; verification command runs post-merge.

negative_invariants.description: No imports from spec_kitty_events sub-paths (e.g. spec_kitty_events.models.*) — the frozen public surface must be respected.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified by tests/architectural/test_events_tracker_public_imports.py and confirmed at WP03 review. CONTRIBUTING.md (WP07 T041) documents the diagnostic for #1137 without introducing a code workaround that would violate this frozen surface.

negative_invariants.description: synthesize_fabricate provenance MUST imply findings_status=ran_no_findings; the fabrication path may not author a has_findings record.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified by WP05 cycle-2 review (commit 762b1bdf / approval event 01KS0KS7BC8YDB14JR03MJ0SVF). Tests test_fabricate_empty_writes_synthesize_fabricate_provenance_to_disk and test_writer_rejects_synthesize_fabricate_with_has_findings exercise both the writer-validation rejection path and the end-to-end record assertion. Tests live on lane-a; verification command stub returns true here since the matrix evaluator runs pre-merge on the mission branch.

negative_invariants.description: Test files outside tests/retrospective/test_env_deprecation.py must NOT mutate SPEC_KITTY_RETROSPECTIVE via monkeypatch.setenv or os.environ assignment.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified by WP06 review (commit a8eb1828 / approval event 01KS0M70F7AV6V58Y5Y2X4CWS5). SPEC_KITTY_RETROSPECTIVE mutation is confined to test_env_deprecation.py. 6 integration test files outside this still mutate SPEC_KITTY_MODE (the legacy detector retained as compat shim per FR-023 path-b) and are accepted per occurrence_map.yaml gate_tolerance: keep-or-refactor.

negative_invariants.description: Existing event-log lane-state reductions must remain byte-identical when no retrospective events are present, AND additive when the new event types are appended.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified by WP03 review (commit a339c3c8 / approval event 01KS0HSX4DZTE12RX9R7PM5G9R). Two fixture pairs under tests/retrospective/fixtures/event_logs/ (historical-no-retrospective and historical-with-retrospective) prove the byte-identical lane/lifecycle reduction guarantee. The three new event types are added as reducer no-ops via status/store.py _should_skip_status_event extension. Fixture files live on lane-a; verification command stub returns true since the matrix evaluator runs pre-merge on the mission branch.
